title: Fragment with curving vine and palmette leaves
description: Fragment with curving vine and palmette leaves, 1400s. Spain, Granada. Silk: lampas weave; overall: 29.9 x 20 cm (11 3/4 x 7 7/8 in.); mounted: 39.1 x 28.9 cm (15 3/8 x 11 3/8 in.). The Cleveland Museum of Art, Dudley P. Allen Fund, 1918.183
